spell.corpse_campus.authority_grasp.guid: Yuzhe tier-3 ultimate. Spend 50 mana to deploy a deathless Spirit Worm that tracks any non-caster player within 30 blocks and dissolves on touch, copying the target's highest non-S-rank anomaly spell into your spellbook. While you know Mystic Attendant, Sneak+Right-click any spell scroll to devour it, raising every anomaly ability you currently have loaded by one level. No cooldown.
tooltip.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_s: Spend 50 mana to deploy a Spirit Worm that tracks other players within %s blocks (expires after %s minutes)
tooltip.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_c: On touch, the worm vanishes and copies the target's highest non-S-rank anomaly spell into your book (skipped if already mastered)
tooltip.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_d: Sneak + Right-click any spell scroll: devour the scroll and raise every loaded anomaly ability by 1 level
message.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_v: %s holds no anomalies; the Spirit Worm dissolves for nothing
message.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_n: %s only carries S-rank anomalies; the Spirit Worm cannot copy them
You have no anomaly spellbook to write into
message.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_a: You already know every copyable anomaly from %s
message.corpse_campus.mystic_attendant_d: The Mystic Attendant devoured this scroll. %s anomalies gained +1 level.
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_soul_g: Killing mobs yields a soul of the matching species
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_soul_s: Cast: open the Necromancer seance to pick Normal / Speed / Attack / Defense / Health summon. Sneak+cast: quick re-summon the last-killed species (enhancement rolled at random)
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_patrol: Minions patrol within %s blocks. Five modes: Stand / Follow / Patrol / Aggressive / Retreat
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_buff_c: Regular summons have a %s%% chance to roll a random special enhancement
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_enhanc: Special summon costs %s extra mana and always triggers the matching enhancement
tooltip.corpse_campus.necromancer_sneak_: Uses the most recently killed mob type
message.corpse_campus.necromancer_no_man: Not enough mana for a special summon
message.corpse_campus.necromancer_type_m: This soul cannot manifest as an entity
message.corpse_campus.necromancer_assign: No living target under your crosshair
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.title: Necromancer's Seance
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.tip_nor: Normal summon; base mana cost; 15%% random enhancement chance
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.tip_spe: Speed type: greatly boosted movement speed (+%s mana)
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.tip_att: Attack type: greatly boosted attack damage (+%s mana)
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.tip_def: Defense type: boosted armor / toughness / knockback resistance (+%s mana)
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.tip_hea: Health type: max HP x2.5 plus absorption (+%s mana)
screen.corpse_campus.necromancer.hint: Press ESC or click Done to finish; the cooldown only starts after you close the screen
spell.corpse_campus.rewind_worm.guide_de: Xujing tier-3 ultimate. After acquiring this spell, the world is backed up into a mirror dimension (an admin must trigger the scan via /magic rewind backup create). The first cast teleports you into the saved mirror world; after a 30-minute cooldown a second cast returns you to the exact dimension and coordinates where you left. The outbound and return casts share one 30-minute cooldown.
tooltip.corpse_campus.rewind_worm_toggle: First cast: travel into the mirror backup dimension. Second cast: return to the dimension and coordinates you left.
tooltip.corpse_campus.rewind_worm_cooldo: Outbound and return share one 30-minute cooldown, fully managed by the ISS spell system (no separate NBT cooldown)
tooltip.corpse_campus.rewind_worm_requir: An admin must first run /magic rewind backup create <player> [radius] to scan the world into the mirror dimension
tooltip.corpse_campus.rewind_worm_mirror: The mirror dimension block states reflect the admin's most recent backup; block entities and entities are not copied
message.corpse_campus.rewind_mirror_not_: Rewind Worm: the mirror dimension is not ready. Ask an admin to run /magic rewind backup create <player> to start the backup scan.
message.corpse_campus.rewind_mirror_miss: Rewind Worm: dimension corpse_campus:rewind_mirror is not loaded. Check that the data pack deployed correctly.
message.corpse_campus.rewind_anchor_lost: Rewind Worm: the return anchor was lost (possibly due to death or a cross-save event), you cannot return to the original location.
message.corpse_campus.rewind_into_mirror: Rewind Worm engaged: you have crossed into the mirror backup dimension.
message.corpse_campus.rewind_out_of_mirr: Rewind Worm closed: you have returned to the backup anchor in your original dimension.
tooltip.corpse_campus.rank_core_hint: Right-click to set the player rank to §e%s§r
tooltip.corpse_campus.rank_core_warning: Only sets the rank field; no spell granted. HP/mana bonuses still come from spells loaded in the book.
tooltip.corpse_campus.ability_clear_hint: Right-click to fully reset the player (abilities, sequence, rank, XP, inventory, gear, effects).
tooltip.corpse_campus.ability_clear_warn: §cWarning: clears entire inventory, armor, Curios slots and XP. Cannot be undone.
message.corpse_campus.ability_cleared: All abilities / sequence / rank / gear / XP / natural awakening progress cleared.
tooltip.corpse_campus.designated_ability: Right-click to open the configuration screen (school / spell / level).
An unawakened player right-clicking this is directly awakened (bypasses the 40 cap).
Pick school, then spell, then level. Click confirm to bind.
message.corpse_campus.designated_ability: Hold a Designated Ability item in your main or off hand before confirming.
This item is already configured. Use or clear it first.
Designated Ability NBT is corrupt; cannot awaken.
message.corpse_campus.awakening_invuln_s: §bAwakening Guard§r: the 3-second invulnerability window saved you
tooltip.corpse_campus.loot_refresh_hint: Right-click to refresh every loot chest in loaded chunks of the current dimension.
tooltip.corpse_campus.loot_refresh_shift: §7Shift + right-click: refresh loaded chunks across ALL dimensions.
tooltip.corpse_campus.loot_refresh_warni: §cClears any remaining items inside; only chests recorded after this mod was installed are recoverable.
message.corpse_campus.loot_refreshed: Refreshed §e%1$s§r chests (§7%2$s§r skipped in unloaded chunks / %3$s dimension(s)).
